summary: A Go-based test orchestration framework with modular runners, schema validation, and agent-driven test execution via GOrchestra.
architecture: monolith (Go monorepo with modular internal packages)
patterns: command pattern via cmd/ directory structure
concerns: large number of agent directories (0005-0019) suggests heavy automated generation with potential duplication
truncated directory names (e.g., internalschema-validatio) indicate filesystem or tooling constraints
test files appear to outnumber implementation files, possible over-testing or missing source files in listing
staging commits suggest work-in-progress orchestration that may not be production-stable
suggestions: consolidate or document the GOrchestra agent directories to reduce clutter
review test coverage ratio to ensure implementation code is adequately represented
add integration tests to complement the extensive unit/extra tests
document the MCP handlers and webhook reporter interfaces for maintainability
consider extracting reporter and schema packages into separate modules if they grow
